authors.author: Spiritual
Spiritual
Er hält die ganze Welt in seiner Hand

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He’s got the whole world in his hands. He’s got the whole world in his hands. He’s got the whole world in his hands. He’s got the whole world in his hands.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He’s got the wind and the rain in his hands. He’s got the wind and the rain in his hands. He’s got the wind and the rain in his hands. He’s got the whole world in his hands.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He’s got the little tiny baby in his hands. He’s got the little tiny baby in his hands. He’s got the little tiny baby in his hands. He’s got the whole world in his hands.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He’s got you and me, brother, in his hands. He’s got you and me, brother, in his hands. He’s got you and me, brother, in his hands. He’s got the whole world in his hands.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He’s got you and me, sister, in his hands. He’s got you and me, sister, in his hands. He’s got you and me, sister, in his hands. He’s got the whole world in his hands.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He’s got everybody here in his hands. He’s got everybody here in his hands. He’s got everybody here in his hands. He’s got the whole world in his hands.
